reference: Hi, I was married four years ago, but I am not pregnant because I am suffering from irregular periods. For four years, I have been using tablets for pregnancy, but my periods remain irregular. I am currently using Gestafine one hundred milligrams, but for the past fifteen days, I have been having my period, and sometimes it does not stop for five days. It can last for fifteen to twenty continuous days. What can I do? Please advise me.
text: Hi, I was married four years ago, but I am not pregnant because I am suffering from irregular periods. For four years, I have been using tablets for pregnancy, but my period is irregular. I am currently using gestafine one hundred milligrams. But for the past fifteen days, I have been having my period, and sometimes it does not stop for five days. It can last for fifteen to twenty continuous days. What can I do? Please advise me.
